sections.paragraph:
χοιρίον, ου, τό (χοῖρος; Aristoph. et al.; PMagd 4, 8 [III b.c.]; Sb 5304, 1) dim. of χοῖρος, lit. ‘a little swine, piglet’, but also dim. only in form, swine, and so B 10:3.—DELG s.v. χοῖρος.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PMagd PMagd = Papyrus de Magdôla—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

dim. dim. = diminutive

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1085
